title: diosma hyponeura
intro: Diosma hyponeura is a small, shrub-like plant native to South Africa, belonging to the Rutaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which are derived from its essential oils. The health benefits of diosma hyponeura include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Diosma hyponeura is typically prepared as an infusion, tincture, or essential oil, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
